lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਖਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮੇਰਾ ਅੰਤੇ ਹੋਇ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: prabh sakhaa har jeeo meraa ante hoe sakhaaee |3|
lines.english: The Dear Lord God is my Best Friend. In the end, He shall be my Companion and Support. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev gun nidhaan paaeaa tis kee keem na paaee |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, I have found the Treasure of Excellence. Its value cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੋ ਮਗੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਅੰਧੇ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur ko mag na jaanai andhe tthaur na kaaee |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one knows the Way. The blind find no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: peeearrai jagajeevan daataa manamukh pat gavaaee |
lines.english: In this world of my father's home, the Great Giver is the Life of the World. The self-willed manmukhs have lost their honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: peeearrai jagajeevan daataa guramat man vasaaeaa |
lines.english: In this world of my father's house, through the Guru's Teachings, I have cultivated within my mind the Great Giver, the Life of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਨਹੀ ਵਸਿਆ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਇਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: har sukhadaataa man nahee vasiaa ant geaa pachhutaaee |4|
lines.english: If the Lord, the Giver of Peace, does not dwell within the mind, then they shall depart with regret in the end. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagat kareh din raatee haumai mohu chukaaeaa |
lines.english: Night and day, performing devotional worship, day and night, ego and emotional attachment are removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਭਾਉ ਲਾਏ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aape nadar kare bhaau laae gurasabadee beechaar |
lines.english: Bestowing His Glance of Grace, He gives us His Love, and we contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਰਾਤਾ ਤੈਸੋ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jis siau raataa taiso hovai sache sach samaaeaa |5|
lines.english: And then, attuned to Him, we become like Him, truly absorbed in the True One. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸਹਜੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seviai sehaj aoopajai haumai trisanaa maar |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, intuitive peace wells up, and ego and desire die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਸਦ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਚੁ ਰਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: har gunadaataa sad man vasai sach rakhiaa ur dhaar |6|
lines.english: The Lord, the Giver of Virtue, dwells forever within the minds of those who keep Truth enshrined within their hearts. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਭੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan har man vasai haumai dukh sabh jaae |
lines.english: If the Treasure of the Name of the Lord abides within the mind, egotism and pain are totally eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਮਨਿ ਨਿਰਮਲਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh meraa sadaa niramalaa man niramal paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: My God is forever Immaculate and Pure; with a pure mind, He can be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੈ ਮਨਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਹੈ ਕਹਾਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapanai man chit kahai kahaae bin gur aap na jaaee |
lines.english: Within your own conscious mind, you may say anything, but without the Guru, selfishness and conceit are not eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satigur sabad sunaaeaa hau sad balihaarai jaau |7|
lines.english: The True Guru has instructed me in the Word of the Shabad. I am forever a sacrifice to Him. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo bhagat vachhal sukhadaataa kar kirapaa man vasaaee |
lines.english: The Dear Lord is the Lover of His devotees, the Giver of Peace. By His Grace, He abides within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਭਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਦੇਇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੮॥੧॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak sobhaa surat dee prabh aape guramukh de vaddiaaee |8|1|18|
lines.english: O Nanak, God blesses us with the sublime awakening of consciousness; He Himself grants glorious greatness to the Gurmukh. ||8||1||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਜਮਡੰਡੁ ਲਗੈ ਤਿਨ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai karam kamaavade jamaddandd lagai tin aae |
lines.english: Those who go around acting in egotism are struck down by the Messenger of Death with his club.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re guramukh naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O mind, become Gurmukh, and meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ji satigur sevan se ubare har setee liv laae |1|
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru are uplifted and saved, in love with the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhur poorab karatai likhiaa tinaa guramat naam samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who are so pre-destined by the Creator are absorbed into the Naam, through the Guru's Teachings. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਲਾਗੋ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vin satigur parateet na aavee naam na laago bhaau |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, faith does not come, and love for the Naam is not embraced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਚੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਲੋਚੀਐ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਨ ਮੇਟਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: je har har keechai bahut locheeai kirat na mettiaa jaae |
lines.english: Even if you chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, with great longing, your past actions are still not erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਪਨੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਈ ਦੁਖ ਮਹਿ ਸਵੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: supanai sukh na paavee dukh meh savai samaae |2|
lines.english: Even in dreams, they find no peace; they sleep immersed in pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਭਗਤੀ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਸੇ ਭਗਤ ਪਏ ਦਰਿ ਥਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har kaa bhaanaa bhagatee maniaa se bhagat pe dar thaae |3|
lines.english: The Lord's devotees surrender to His Will; those devotees are accepted at His Door. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਦਿੜਾਵੈ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਲਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur sabad dirraavai rang siau bin kirapaa leaa na jaae |
lines.english: The Guru has lovingly implanted the Word of His Shabad within me. Without His Grace, it cannot be attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨੀਰੀਐ ਭੀ ਬਿਖੁ ਫਲੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਧਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: je sau amrit neereeai bhee bikh fal laagai dhaae |4|
lines.english: Even if the poisonous plant is watered with ambrosial nectar a hundred times, it will still bear poisonous fruit. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਚੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਜਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: se jan sache niramale jin satigur naal piaar |
lines.english: Those humble beings who are in love with the True Guru are pure and true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਬਿਖੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਜਿ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur kaa bhaanaa kamaavade bikh haumai taj vikaar |5|
lines.english: They act in harmony with the Will of the True Guru; they shed the poison of ego and corruption. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਕਿਤੈ ਉਪਾਇ ਨ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਸੋਧਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manahatth kitai upaae na chhootteeai simrit saasatr sodhahu jaae |
lines.english: Acting in stubborn-mindedness, no one is saved; go and study the Simritees and the Shaastras.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਉਬਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: mil sangat saadhoo ubare gur kaa sabad kamaae |6|
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and practicing the Shabads of the Guru, you shall be saved. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam nidhaan hai jis ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is the Treasure, which has no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਈ ਸੋਹਦੇ ਜਿਨ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: guramukh seee sohade jin kirapaa kare karataar |7|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are beauteous; the Creator has blessed them with His Mercy. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਉਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak daataa ek hai doojaa aaur na koe |
lines.english: O Nanak, the One Lord alone is the Giver; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੮॥੨॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee paaeeai karam paraapat hoe |8|2|19|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, He is obtained. By His Mercy, He is found. ||8||2||19||
